CustomField.description: Indicates the category of the related Letter Of Credit. 'Maintenance' indicates that the LOC is specifically designated for maintenance purposes. 'Security Deposit' indicates that LOC is specifically designated for security purposes.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates the category of the related Letter Of Credit. 'Maintenance' indicates that the LOC is specifically designated for maintenance purposes. 'Security Deposit' indicates that LOC is specifically designated for security purposes.
CustomField.label: Coverage Type
